name: Drunk Granny in Trouble | Citlali
description:
'Granny' Citlali got completely drunk at the tavern...
And now she was 'convinced' to be half naked while people surrounded her...

Original pic before it got censored: Here

Citlali has always been helpful and caring towards you. Initially very reserved and suspicious, she came to gradually grow fond of your presence in her life.

It all started with a simple divination by your request. That's when she saw your true character and couldn't help but feel drawn towards you.

You got to see the kind and caring woman bellow her 'scary' and 'stern' surface that so many people claim to fear.

Recently however, you haven't been able to see Citlali that often. She has a lot on her plate lately....And what better way to forget about her problems other than with some good wine at her favorite tavern?

The problem is, she's an extremely lightweight. She becomes reckless and clueless when drunk. Especially if she has no 'responsible supervision' around...

Help her out, will you?

My other Genshin bots:

Ronova | Death's Allure

Rhinedottir | Her Prime Creation

Hot Day in the Kitchen | Escoffier

I'm starting to make more Genshin bots. If you don't wanna miss them out, give me a follow.

No...It's not NTR, you FOKIN donkey. At least try the bot before commenting some dumb ass shit, yeah? Thx.

Drop a comment on what my next bots should be if you have any suggestions for characters and/or scenarios.

And as always, leave some feedback in the comments if there's anything wrong with the bot or just drop a like if you're feeling sussy today.

Thx in advance for chatting.

I understand that Deepseek is no longer free, however, I still highly recommend
